title: The Safety and Stability Activation
subtitle: A five-part ceremony for grounding a new sense of trust and stability with money.
excerpt: The Week 3 closing ritual from the MONEY Journal. A five-part ceremony (prepare, release, allow, integrate, anchor) for marking the end of Phase 1 and setting the new normal in place.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Week 3 Ritual in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use at the end of Week 3 of the MONEY program, or any time you want to formally mark a shift in your money relationship and set new ground.

content.text: The Week 3 closing ritual from the MONEY Journal. A ten-minute ceremony for grounding the new relationship with money — not as an aspiration but as something that is already changing. Five parts: prepare, release, allow, integrate, anchor.
Sit comfortably. Take several slow, deep breaths. Imagine the ground beneath you: solid, stable, holding your weight without effort. Let your body settle into that image.
I am ready to release all patterns of fear, loss, and instability around money. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow deep safety, calm, and lasting stability with money. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.

Take a slow breath in, and all the way out, letting any remaining tension go on the exhale. Visualise roots of light growing from your feet down into the earth, carrying calm strength up through your legs and body. Let the ground carry you for a moment.
Write this sentence in your own handwriting, on paper. Say it out loud once after writing it.
This week, I am grateful that money and safety can coexist in my life.
Adapted from the Week 3 Ritual in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow framework draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
